title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Suven Pharmaceuticals

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Suven Pharmaceuticals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Suven Pharmaceuticals in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals:
Suven Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals!
